description:
Safely store your files and access them from any device

Choose folders on your computer to sync with Google Drive or backup to Google Photos, and access all of your content directly from your PC or Mac
- Google Drive for desktop has been updated with the new suite of Google Workspace icons that visually reflect our evolution in the AI era.
- New buttons have been added to the Drive for desktop interface and file menus. Clicking these buttons opens the Gemini web application to provide AI-powered capabilities.
- Backup to Google Photos will soon no longer be available. In-app notifications will begin prompting users to transition to Google Photos.
- Bug fixes and performance improvements.
Important: This is the last release that supports macOS Monterey 12. To remain supported, macOS users must upgrade to macOS Ventura 13.0 or later by June 2026.
